core_logic_signatures.name: __init__
core_logic_signatures.source:
def __init__(self, config: Dict[str, Any], kernel: Optional[Any] = None):
        """
        Initializes the Lexica Agent.

        Args:
            config (dict): Configuration dictionary.
            kernel (Optional[Any]): Semantic Kernel instance.
        """
        super().__init__(config, kernel=kernel)
        self.data_sources = self.config.get('data_sources', {})
        self.api_keys = self.config.get('api_keys', {})

core_logic_signatures.name: execute
core_logic_signatures.note: In a real telemetry pipeline, large functions can be truncated or omitted entirely in favor of the 'ast_hash' to save network bandwidth and storage costs.
